name: Insurance Australia Group Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$7.7832. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$7.7832, stop A$7.3606, target A$8.0400. Risk/reward is 0.61:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
